arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Crystal Palace Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Tottenham, sitting in 16th place, host Crystal Palace, who are currently 12th, in a Premier League clash at Tottenham Stadium on Sunday, May 11th at 14:15. Tottenham vs Crystal Palace Form Tottenham...

arts.ttl: Tottenham handed major injury boost ahead of Europa League final run-in - with Spurs star set to return to action against Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has been forced to deal with several injury headaches this season and his side have slumped down to 16th in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Tottenham captain Son Heung-min could return for Palace clash – Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Son Heung-min has not played for Tottenham since April 10.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace star Adam Wharton faces battle to be fit for FA Cup final after being ruled OUT of Tottenham clash...while Oliver Glasner praises Spurs boss Ange Postecoglou for weathering 's***storm'
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner confirmed the England midfielder has been in 'too much pain' to train this week after Wharton limped out of Palace's draw with Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Glasner provides team news update ahead of Tottenham trip - News - Crystal Palace F.C.
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says Crystal Palace will be without Adam Wharton for Sunday's away trip to Tottenham Hotspur (14:15 BST) - but has confirmed there are no other fresh injury concerns for the Eagles.
